org.saidone.component.BaseComponent

Package
Description
org.saidone

org.saidone.collector

org.saidone.service
 

  • Uses of BaseComponent in org.saidone

    Subclasses of BaseComponent in org.saidone
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AlfrescoNodeProcessorApplicationRunner
    Runs the application from the command line.
    class 
    AlfrescoNodeProcessorConfiguration
    Spring configuration that defines common beans used by the application such as the queue and the lists of asynchronous tasks.

  • Uses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.aspect

    Subclasses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.aspect
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NodesApiReadOnlyAspect
    Aspect that intercepts write operations executed through Alfresco's NodesApi.

  • Uses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.collector

    Subclasses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.collector
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNodeCollector
    Base implementation of NodeCollector providing repository storage and a default asynchronous execution of NodeCollector.collectNodes(CollectorConfig).
    class 
    DbTreeCollector
    Collects node identifiers by querying the Alfresco database directly.
    class 
    NodeListCollector
    Collects node identifiers from a text file where each line contains a node id.
    class 
    NodeTreeCollector
    Walks a node tree starting from a given root node or path and collects the identifiers of all descendant nodes.
    class 
    QueryNodeCollector
    Executes an Alfresco FTS query and stores the resulting node identifiers.
    class 
    TrashcanNodeCollector
    Collects node identifiers from Alfresco trashcan and stores them.

  • Uses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.processor

    Subclasses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.processor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNodeProcessor
    Base implementation of NodeProcessor that consumes node identifiers from a shared queue and delegates the concrete operation to NodeProcessor.processNode(String, ProcessorConfig).
    class 
    AspectsAndPropertiesProcessor
    Applies aspect and property updates to nodes loaded from Alfresco.
    class 
    ChainingNodeProcessor
    A processor that delegates node processing to a chain of other processors.
    class 
    DeleteNodeProcessor
    Deletes each node passed to the processor.
    class 
    DownloadNodeProcessor
    Downloads content and metadata of a node to the local filesystem.
    class 
    LogNodeNameProcessor
    Logs the name of each processed node.
    class 
    MoveNodeProcessor
    Moves nodes to the configured target parent node.
    class 
    NormalizeMetadataProcessor
    Metadata normalization processor.
    class 
    SetPermissionsProcessor
    Applies permission settings to each processed node.
    class 
    TrashcanNodeProcessor
    Processes deleted nodes from Alfresco trashcan.
    class 
    VoidProcessor
    No-op processor used as placeholder.

  • Uses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.service

    Subclasses of BaseComponent in org.saidone.service
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    LockService
    Ensures that only one instance of the application runs at a time.
    class 
    StatsLoggerService
    Periodically logs statistics about queued and processed nodes.
